name: Venetian Stuffing with Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Fresh Swiss Chard or Spinach, cooked, squeezed dry and finely chopped
1 1/2 oz Fontina or Jarlsberg cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add onion; cook for 2 minutes.
2. Stir in walnuts, garlic, pancetta, and herbs, and continue cooking about 2 minutes, being careful not to burn the herbs. Remove from heat and let cool.
3. Transfer to a mixing bowl, add remaining ingredients, and blend well. Taste and adjust seasoning as desired.
Ahead: Stuffing can be prepared up to 2 days ahead. Cover and refrigerate.
